result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 15:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT
    b.case_id,
    b.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.closeddate - b.createddate)) AS handle_time_seconds
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_assignments coa ON coa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(coa.owner_assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_case_count
  FROM managed_counts
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
    AVG(ntc.handle_time_seconds) AS avg_handle_time_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS closed_non_transferred_case_count
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.managed_case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT
    b.case_id,
    b.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.closeddate - b.createddate)) AS handle_time_seconds
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_assignments coa ON coa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(coa.owner_assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_case_count
  FROM managed_counts
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
    AVG(ntc.handle_time_seconds) AS avg_handle_time_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS closed_non_transferred_case_count
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.managed_case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH case_owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT
    b.case_id,
    b.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.closeddate - b.createddate)) AS handle_time_seconds
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_assignments coa ON coa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(coa.owner_assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_case_count
  FROM managed_counts
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
    AVG(ntc.handle_time_seconds) AS avg_handle_time_seconds,
    COUNT(*) AS closed_non_transferred_case_count
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.managed_case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_assignment_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT
    b.case_id,
    b.owner_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.closed_ts - b.created_ts)) AS handle_time_seconds
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_assignments coa ON coa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(coa.owner_assignment_cnt, 0) <= 1
), managed_counts AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.oldvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    COALESCE(ch.newvalue__c, c.ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN casehistory__c ch
    ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
   AND ch.field__c = 'Owner'
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS managed_case_count
  FROM managed_counts
  WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY agent_id
), agent_aht AS (
  SELECT
    ntc.owner_id AS agent_id,
    AVG(ntc.handle_time_seconds) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  GROUP BY ntc.owner_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM agent_aht a
JOIN agent_case_counts acc ON acc.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE acc.managed_case_count > 1
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
